item.message: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git diff --no-ext-diff --no-color | awk 'BEGIN {a=0; d=0; m=0} /"'^'"\\+\\+\\+ / {next} /"'^--- / {next} /''^'"\\+/ {a++; if (index(substr("'$0,2), "FIXED-06000")) m++} /''^-/ {d++} END {printf "added=%d removed=%d marker=%d'"\\n\", a, d, m}'"
